title: Catalog audit lacks override path for captionless/subfigure visuals
evidence: audit-book parser/smoke iteration reaches parser-green, but smoke stays critical at H6/H7: parsed/_catalog_audit.md reports unresolved Figure refs=1 (Figure 1.3) and empty_captions=10. Cases include OCR-spaced caption text on ch01 body[300] ('F i g u r e 1 . 3') and captionless subfigures / split composites in ch05 body[28:30], ch07 body[237:238], appE body[163,167], appF body[111,131]. Existing extract_rules fields cannot bind adjacent prose captions or mark non-catalog subfigure shards.
proposal: Add a reviewable catalog override path (or deterministic nearby-caption promotion/exclude-reason mechanism) so audit-book can clear catalog smoke without changing parser/build_catalogs engine code for each book.
